CustomField.description: Org-wide kill switch for the Pillar 5 scoring + findings runtime. When false, FormAnswerScoringTrigger short-circuits before any evaluation or finding upsert, regardless of per-template Scoring_Enabled__c. Default false preserves backward compatibility for orgs that don't run scored audits. Per repo convention this is a hierarchy custom setting field and is intentionally NOT included in the FieldForms_Admin / FieldForms_User perm sets (matches Disable_Form_Template_JSON_Trigger__c, Snapshot_V2_Enabled__c, Question_Catalog_Enabled__c).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Master switch for scoring. Each template still needs its own Scoring_Enabled__c flag; this gates the runtime work at the org level so a noisy trigger never fires when scoring isn't being used.
CustomField.label: Scoring Enabled
